dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9315 IH: Workforce Dignity Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Grothman (for himself and Mr. Onder) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Ways and Means, and in addition to the Committees on Small Business, and Transportation and Infrastructure, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned

form.official-title: To amend the Small Business Act, the Internal Revenue Code of 1986, title 40, United States Code, and title IV of the Social Security Act to replace the term sheltered workshop with community rehabilitation program, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Workforce Dignity Act.

section.header: Replacing the term sheltered workshop with community rehabilitation program

subsection.header: Programs for blind and handicapped individuals
subsection.text: Section 15(c)(6) of the Small Business Act (15 U.S.C. 644(c)(6)) is amended by striking sheltered workshop each place it appears and inserting community rehabilitation program.

subsection.header: Task force on purchases from the blind and severely handicapped
subsection.text: Section 133(c) of the Small Business Administration Reauthorization and Amendment Act of 1988 (15 U.S.C. 644 note) is amended by striking sheltered workshops and inserting community rehabilitation programs.
Section 152(d)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended—

paragraph.text: by striking sheltered workshop each place it appears and inserting community rehabilitation program;
in subparagraph (A), by striking such workshop each place it appears and inserting such program; and
in subparagraph (B), by striking Sheltered workshop defined in the heading and inserting Community rehabilitation program defined.

subsection.text: Section 593 of title 40, United States Code, is amended—

paragraph.text: by striking sheltered workshop each place it appears and inserting community rehabilitation program;
by striking sheltered workshops each place it appears and inserting community rehabilitation programs; and
in subsection (a)(2), by striking Sheltered workshop in the heading and inserting Community rehabilitation program.

subsection.text: Section 477(b)(3)(F) of the Social Security Act (42 U.S.C. 677(b)(3)(F)) is amended by striking sheltered workshops and inserting community rehabilitation programs.
This Act shall be construed to amend Federal law to remove the term sheltered workshop without any intent to change the application of such law.
